name: Varun Kumar R

education.degree: MSc in Data Science & Artificial Intelligence

bullets: Built Python automation scripts, improving data-entry efficiency by 30%
Designed small-scale ML prototypes to analyse structured data
Collaborated with senior developers to debug and optimise code

projects.title: Telecom Customer Churn Prediction
projects.summary: End-to-end ML pipeline predicting customer churn using Random Forest and XGBoost classifiers. Enables proactive retention strategies.

projects.title: Plant Disease Detection
projects.summary: CNN-based image classification system detecting crop disease from leaf photographs. ~90% accuracy across multiple disease categories.

projects.title: Twitter Sentiment Analysis
projects.summary: NLP pipeline classifying 50,000+ tweets as positive, negative, or neutral for brand monitoring. 82% F1-score.

projects.title: IoT-Based Air Quality Monitoring
projects.summary: Sensor-based system predicting pollution levels in real time using ML. Presented at a National Conference in 2024.

projects.title: E-commerce Customer Segmentation
projects.summary: Unsupervised ML segmenting customers into high-value groups. Boosted targeted marketing retention by 15-20%.

projects.title: AI Health Assistant Chatbot
projects.summary: Conversational AI chatbot using Microsoft Phi-1.5 via HuggingFace with a Gradio web interface. Answers health queries with a fairness-enforcing system prompt. Deployed in Google Colab.

projects.title: Prompt Engineering for AI Language Models
projects.summary: MSc Dissertation (2025-2026). Investigating how prompt design shapes LLM behaviour, output quality and evaluation. Explores chain-of-thought, few-shot, zero-shot strategies and evaluation frameworks.
